unit.name: WP_Http deprecated transport selection and dispatch behavior
unit.public_contract: This fixture executes copied WordPress 7.0 deprecated transport selection and dispatch logic in isolated PHP CLI probes with deterministic fake cURL/streams transports. It observes default selection, streams fallback, deprecated transport ordering filter behavior, no-transport failure, dispatch debug action, response filtering, and WP_Error preservation without claiming live HTTP transport, socket/cURL execution, Requests network I/O, DNS/TLS/proxy behavior, installed distribution behavior, or generated public PHP ownership.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass deprecated transport dispatch, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded transport gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
